t_ch: 阁下的敌意，在我计算之中。
t_en: Your enmity is well within my calculations.

t_ch: 「容我再次强调，<color=#dbc291ff>阿那克萨戈拉斯阁下已经掌握了你的要害</color>。」
t_en: "Allow me to reiterate that <color=#dbc291ff>Lord Anaxagoras now has a firm grasp on your crucial weakness.</color>"

t_ch: 「若你仍在密谋加害几位无名客，俱乐部此前的警告绝非虚言。」
t_en: "If you still plot to harm the Nameless, then you will find that the Society's previous warnings were not empty threats."

t_ch: …自然，我会把握好应有的分寸。
t_en: ...I understand. I'll only do what needs to be done.

t_ch: 难以置信，我竟要与投身「毁灭」的天才同行。
t_en: I never imagined that I'd one day walk alongside a genius who offered himself to the Destruction.

t_ch: 我的立场从未改变：「智识」的溃败无可避免。
t_en: My stance has never changed. The Erudition's ruin is inevitable.

t_ch: 但在那之前，我很乐意见证几位无名客重逢，并护送你们踏上归途。
t_en: But before that... I'd be very willing to witness the reunion of the Nameless and to escort you on your way home.

t_ch: 显然，她的出现打乱了你的部署，甚至让你不得不寻求「合作」。
t_en: More like her appearance completely interrupted your plans, even forcing you to seek out "collaboration."

t_ch: 这一点，我记下了。
t_en: I'll remember that.

t_ch: 您言语间的锋芒依旧。但切记，「偶然」才是万物运转的常态。那位「天渊万龙之祖」的消逝，便是前车之鉴。
t_en: Your words are as sharp as ever, but remember, "happenstance" is the only true constant in the universe. The demise of the Progenitor of All Dragons is a testament to that.

t_ch: 随我来吧。我很荣幸，能为一位「不朽」的龙裔提供指引。
t_en: Come with me. I am honored to guide a Scion of Permanence.

t_ch: 这些忆灵…是她？
t_en: These memosprites... Is it her...?

t_ch: 「记忆」的迷因无处不在。那位女士，在我视野的盲区编织出一张巨大的网络。
t_en: The memetic entities of the Remembrance are everywhere. That lady wove a giant web in my blind spot.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>她入侵并感染了「岁月」泰坦</color>，将翁法罗斯沉积的数据转化为忆域的傀儡。
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>She hacked and infected the Time Titan</color>, converting the built-up data of Amphoreus into puppets of the Memory Zone.

t_ch: 听起来，你们发生过不少过节。
t_en: Sounds like you two have quite the history already.

t_ch: 任何意图染指实验的变量都值得我关注。
t_en: Any variables that desire to influence the experiment deserve my attention.

t_ch: 可你从未提起过她。难道「智识」的天才也会被人入侵大脑么？
t_en: But you never mentioned her before. Could even a genius of the Erudition get his brains hacked?

t_ch: …丹恒阁下，我只是陈述事实：那位女士，对你而言亦是不可忽视的威胁。
t_en: ...Lord Dan Heng, I'm simply stating a fact. That lady is also a threat to you, a threat that you cannot afford to ignore.

t_ch: 「记忆」在她手中被轻易掐灭，不留痕迹。其手段决绝，仿佛与这条命途有着不解之仇。
t_en: She snuffed out the Remembrance without any effort and left nothing behind. Her actions were so determined... as if she had an unquenchable hatred against that Path.

t_ch: 矛盾往往是真相的钥匙，「三月七」阁下的过去…是一片深不见底的黑暗呐。
t_en: Contradictions are often the keys to the truth. Lady "March 7th's" past... is a bottomless darkness.

t_ch: 然后呢，指望我会因此与你联手？
t_en: And? Do you expect me to join forces with you because of that?

t_ch: 我只需知道一件事：「她」和三月七的过去有关。
t_en: All I need to know is that "she" has something to do with March 7th's past.

t_ch: 也罢。我只是提供一个思考的方向。选择权仍在您手中。
t_en: Fine. I am only giving you a possibility for you to ponder. The choice is still in your hands.

t_ch: 沉重的过往正如漫漫长夜，其中蛰伏着何种罪恶——曾经身为持明龙尊的您，理应比我更清楚。
t_en: A heavy past is like an everlasting night. As to what kinds of sins lurk within, you should know that better than I do, former Vidyadhara high elder.

t_ch: 我确实比你更懂得「面对过去」，第一位天才。
t_en: Yes, I indeed know how to "face the past" better than you do, First Genius.

t_ch: 我无意否认。继续前进吧，丹恒阁下。
t_en: I have no intention of refuting that. Let us keep going, Lord Dan Heng.
...Hmm?

t_ch: 没想到，仍有漏网之鱼啊。
t_en: I didn't think there were still some that got away.

t_ch: 解释一下。
t_en: Explain.

t_ch: 忆庭的窃贼。漫长的时间里，他们觊觎这个世界，却始终被阻挡在外。
t_en: They are thieves from the Garden. They have long coveted this world, but had always been kept out.

t_ch: 多亏诸位的「努力」，这群人等到了机会。但他们不幸遇上了「三月小姐」，被逐一抽离心识，沦为空壳。
t_en: They finally got a chance thanks to your "efforts." Unfortunately, they ran into "Miss March" and their consciousnesses were plucked out one by one, reducing them to mere husks.

t_ch: 而侥幸逃脱的人，也沦陷在黑潮中，化作这般扭曲的模样。
t_en: Those who were lucky enough to escape her drowned in the black tide, becoming these twisted figures.

t_ch: 可它们的样子，与黑潮造物大相径庭。
t_en: But they look very different from the usual Black Tide Creatures.

t_ch: 其中缘由，正与我们的目的地有关。
t_en: The reason has to do with our destination.

t_ch: 先解决眼前的威胁，我再为您揭晓答案吧。
t_en: Let us deal with the threats before us first. Then, I'll reveal the answer to you.

t_ch: 你果然不打算出手。
t_en: You really have no intention of fighting, do you?

t_ch: 呵呵，我没有协助您的立场。
t_en: Hehe. I have no grounds to assist you.

t_ch: 何况，鄙人仍在天才们的监视之下，可不希望此刻的举动，被误解为对您的挑衅。
t_en: Besides, the geniuses are still keeping a close eye on me. I would hate for anything I do to be misconstrued as provocation against you.

t_ch: …算了，那就让我来扫清前路。
t_en: ...Never mind. Let me clear the way.

t_ch: 出神入化的枪术，十分精彩。
t_en: What splendid spearmanship. Truly remarkable.

t_ch: 继续刚才的话题吧。
t_en: Let's get back on our previous topic.

t_ch: 这些窃忆者企图渗透黑潮的温床，以窃取「铁墓」的记忆。
t_en: These Memosnatchers attempted to infiltrate the breeding ground of the black tide to steal Irontomb's memories.

t_ch: 听起来，这只是自取灭亡。
t_en: That sounds like a surefire way of destroying themselves.

t_ch: 关于这点，我们略有分歧：正因他们无惧生死，才有机会触碰真理。
t_en: Well, our views differ on that. They had a chance to reach the truth precisely because they did not fear death.

t_ch: 这一世，<color=#dbc291ff>那位徒劳的负世者将自身化作封印</color>，意图压制黑潮的蔓延。
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>That futile worldbearer turned himself into a seal</color> in this cycle, attempting to suppress the black tide's spread.

t_ch: 他的金血渗入海潮、遍及大地，为世界刻下了「毁灭」的伤痕。
t_en: His golden blood soaked into the ocean tides and covered the earth, etching the scar of Destruction into this world.

t_ch: 而这道创伤，将为您指明前行的方向。
t_en: And that scar... shall point the way forward for you.

t_ch: 黎明云崖……
t_en: Dawncloud...

t_ch: 在这座悬崖上，我见证了三千万次「徒劳」的终点。
t_en: I have witnessed thirty million "futile" ends atop this cliff.

t_ch: 阁下或许难以认同，但我向来认为，这一数字让我成为了最理解卡厄斯兰那的人。
t_en: You may not agree with me, but I've always believed that this number has made me the person who understands Khaslana the most.

t_ch: 那一日，也是在这里，他斩下我的头颅，剑锋直指「毁灭」的星神。
t_en: This is also where he decapitated me on that day and pointed his sword at the Aeon of Destruction.

t_ch: 他迎来了一场惨败，也成就了一件壮举……
t_en: He suffered a tragic defeat, but also achieved a legendary deed...

t_ch: …一滴燃烧的<color=#dbc291ff>净世金血</color>，自神的伤口流下。
t_en: ...A drop of burning <color=#dbc291ff>golden blood, the blood that will cleanse the world</color>, dripped from the god's wound.

t_ch: 纳努克…？白厄伤到了祂？
t_en: Nanook...? Phainon managed to hurt THEM?

t_ch: 没错。它熔进卡厄斯兰那的身躯，成为「毁灭」最后的赐福。
t_en: Yes. It melded into Khaslana's body, becoming the Destruction's final blessing.

t_ch: 若你要驱散迷雾，找到那位「三月七」的所在，就上前去，唤醒他的怒火吧。
t_en: If you wish to dispel the fog and find that "March 7th," then go and awaken his fury.

t_ch: 她藏匿于「岁月」的夹缝，翁法罗斯最隐秘的角落。也只有最为暴烈的意志，才能冲破忆域，照亮她的去向……
t_en: She hides in the crevices of Time in the most concealed corner of Amphoreus. Only the most ferocious will can break through the Memory Zone and illuminate her footsteps...

t_ch: 正如烈日只在长夜的尽头升起。
t_en: Just like how the blazing sun can only rise at the end of the evernight.

t_ch: 要如何证明，这不是你的又一场阴谋？
t_en: How do I know this won't be another trick of yours?

t_ch: 促成你们携手，于我百害而无一利。
t_en: I have nothing to gain from helping you two work together.

t_ch: 但这一世，面对我的呼唤，卡厄斯兰那从未回应。
t_en: But in this cycle, Khaslana never answered my calls.

t_ch: 或许他的心智早已消陨；或许他依然清醒，仍在和黑潮的低语抗争。
t_en: Perhaps his mind has already eroded away... Or perhaps he is still awake, still fighting the whispers of the black tide.

t_ch: 内心深处，我唯独希望：你和{NICKNAME}阁下，能为我带来答案。
t_en: Deep down, I only wish that you and the esteemed {NICKNAME} could bring me an answer.

t_ch: 别无他法么……
t_en: Is there really no other way...?

t_ch: 对你而言，已经过去多久了呢？
t_en: How long has it been for you?

t_ch: 卡厄斯兰那……
t_en: Khaslana...

t_ch: …白厄，我回来了。
t_en: ...Phainon, I'm back.

t_ch: 这是……
t_en: What...?

t_ch: 「当你毫无怨言，背负起世界的时候…属于你的自我，就无法诞生了啊……」
t_en: "The moment you took the world upon your shoulders without hesitation... You lost the chance to ever be yourself..."

t_ch: 「驱使你挥剑的并非职责，而是仇恨。在那仇恨背后，你仿佛…在期盼毁灭自身。」
t_en: "Duty does not drive you to wield your blade, but hate. Behind that hatred, you seem to... desire the destruction of the self."

t_ch: 「逐火是不断失却的旅途。但你会失去的，远比生命更为沉重。」
t_en: "Losses are a constant on the Flame-Chase journey. What you stand to lose weighs far heavier than life itself."

t_ch: 「可正因你在痛苦，你才远比常人强大。」
t_en: "It is because you suffer that you are so much stronger than any ordinary person."

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，还有…丹恒。
t_en: {NICKNAME}... and... Dan Heng.

t_ch: 你…还记得我们。
t_en: You... still remember us.

t_ch: 这两个名字，如同烙印。
t_en: Those two names... are like brands.

t_ch: 那…我会告诉你。对于你漫长的旅途，这两个名字只出现弹指一挥间。
t_en: Then... I'll tell you that those two names only appeared for a blink of an eye in your long journey.

t_ch: 但我们曾为保护脚下这座圣城并肩而战，也曾在这座悬崖…见证过彼此的决心。
t_en: But we once fought together to protect this holy city beneath our feet... and we witnessed each other's resolve at this very cliff.

t_ch: 除去启程的信念，我已忘记一切。就连这副身躯，也和你的话语一样陌生。
t_en: I have forgotten everything except the belief I had when I set off. Even this body is as alien to me as your words.

t_ch: 我只知道，必须囚禁…那吞噬一切的「毁灭」。
t_en: All I know is that... I must imprison the Destruction that swallows all.

t_ch: 如果，我们也是为此而来呢？
t_en: What if I tell you that we're here for the same thing?

t_ch: 看看这世界如今的模样，你知道它在等待什么。
t_en: Look at what this world has become. You know what it's waiting for.

t_ch: 即便遗忘了一切，我仍相信你能和过去一样，做出正确的抉择。
t_en: Even if you've forgotten everything, I still believe that you'll make the right choice, like you did in the past.

t_ch: 我们何曾有过抉择，何曾能左右世界的存亡。
t_en: When have we ever had a choice? When were we ever masters of this world's fate?

t_ch: 纵使背负万众的理想，也只能…铸就「毁灭」的恶念。
t_en: Even though I shoulder the dreams of millions of lives, I could only... forge the Destruction's evil will.

t_ch: 我认识的每一个人都已死去，我妄图拯救的世界也支离破碎。
t_en: Everyone I know is dead, and the world I dared to save has been torn to pieces.

t_ch: 所以，退下吧。此身从不为「救世」而伫立。
t_en: So... begone. This body never existed to carry out "Deliverance."

t_ch: …哈，何必这么严肃？
t_en: ...Hah, there's no need to be so serious.

t_ch: 抱歉，睡了长长的一觉，先醒来的，都是些不愉快的回忆啊。
t_en: Sorry. I had a really long nap, and all the bad memories woke up first.

t_ch: 好久不见，伙伴。
t_en: Long time no see, partner.

t_ch: 对我来说，只是短暂的分别。
t_en: Well, it was only a very brief farewell for me.

t_ch: 我们曾并肩同行，将后背交给彼此。唯独这份记忆，绝对不会磨灭。
t_en: We once walked side by side and trusted each other to watch our backs. That memory will never fade away, even if all else does.

t_ch: 正因它如此珍贵，深埋心底，才需要更多时间……
t_en: And because it was so precious and hidden so deep in my heart, it needed more time...

t_ch: 再度苏醒。
t_en: To wake up.

t_ch: 「开拓」…有意思。在你们的世界，那也是一尊受万人景仰的泰坦吧。
t_en: Trailblazing... What an interesting concept. Surely, on your worlds, that is also a Titan revered by the masses?

t_ch: 无需再确认两位的决心了。而今，将由我等接过神明的职责，庇佑翁法罗斯众生——
t_en: There's no need to further confirm your resolve. Today, we inherit the duty of the gods, safeguarding the inhabitants of Amphoreus—

t_ch: 与我一同，成为英雄吧！
t_en: Stand with me, and become heroes!

t_ch: 听到了吗？「英雄」啊，我何时忘记过这个词的重量？
t_en: Did you hear that? "Heroes"... I have never forgotten the weight of that word.

t_ch: 即便我已不再是英雄，所留下的，也只有无尽的怒火。
t_en: Even though I am no longer a hero and the only thing remaining in me is the boundless flames of wrath.

t_ch: 可点燃一团火，也可以是为了照亮前路。
t_en: But lighting a fire can also illuminate the path ahead.

t_ch: 我认识的每一个人都已死去，我妄图拯救的世界也支离破碎。
t_en: Everyone I know is dead, and the world I dared to save has been torn to pieces.

t_ch: 但我认识的人里，仍有一群{RUBY_B#无名客}「英雄」{RUBY_E#}存在。
t_en: But there is still a group of {RUBY_B#Nameless}"heroes"{RUBY_E#} that I know...

t_ch: 而他们将为翁法罗斯，带来真正的明天。
t_en: And they will bring the true tomorrow to Amphoreus.

t_ch: 此身从不为「救世」而伫立。
t_en: This body never existed to carry out "Deliverance."

t_ch: 它只为{RUBY_B#「开拓」}「负世」{RUBY_E#}而燃烧。
t_en: It only ever burned for {RUBY_B#Trailblaze}"Worldbearing."{RUBY_E#}

t_ch: 所以，我要先一步去往明天了。
t_en: So, I'm going to head towards tomorrow first.

t_ch: 别让我等太久啊。丹恒…{NICKNAME}。
t_en: Don't make me wait too long, Dan Heng... {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 当然。
t_en: Deal.

t_ch: 生于「毁灭」，又有何妨？
t_en: What if we were born from the Destruction?

t_ch: 不必考量本心，不必渴求胜利。若我生来就是罪恶的容器……
t_en: There is no need to question your heart, no need to crave victory. If I am born to be a vessel of sin...

t_ch: 那就向着罪恶怒吼，为后世「开拓」黎明！
t_en: Then I shall roar at evil, and Trailblaze a dawn for future generations to come!

t_ch: 不会花上太久，我们的道路一定会再交汇。
t_en: It won't be too long before our paths cross again.

t_ch: 躁动从神悟树庭传来，阁下该启程了。
t_en: There is a ruckus coming from the Grove of Epiphany. It is time for you to set out, my lord.

t_ch: 另有一则提醒：<color=#dbc291ff>这一世，一位特立独行的半神偏离了逐火的命运。</color>
t_en: I have another notice for you: <color=#dbc291ff>In this cycle, an eccentric demigod deviated from their Flame-Chase destiny.</color>

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「大地」荒笛</color>，它在无人知晓的历史中陨落。此事疑点重重，与三千万世的演算相悖……
t_en: In a history known by none, <color=#dbc291ff>Terravox, the "Earth,"</color> fell. This matter has remained extremely mysterious, contradicting the extrapolations of thirty million cycles...

t_ch: 有理由怀疑，这也和「三月七」阁下有关。
t_en: I have reasons to suspect it also has something to do with Lady "March 7th."

t_ch: 事到如今，无法得出结论的线索不重要。
t_en: As of now, clues that yield no conclusions are not important.

t_ch: 白厄已经为我指明了方向。开启通道吧。
t_en: Phainon already pointed me in the right direction. Open the way.

t_ch: 「赞达尔」将丹恒送入了「神话之外」……
t_en: "Zandar" sent Dan Heng into the Exomyth...

t_ch: 丹恒阁下已经离开，你可以畅所欲言了——阿那克萨戈拉斯阁下。
t_en: Lord Dan Heng is gone. You can now speak your mind, Lord Anaxagoras.

t_ch: 感谢赏脸，我还以为，您不打算搭理我这位老熟人了呢。
t_en: Thanks for the honor. And here I thought you weren't ever going to acknowledge your old friend.

t_ch: 灵感回路记录着，你无数次带领我登上这黎明云崖。最近一次就在上一世，嚯，由刻法勒垂手迎接……
t_en: The Inspiration Circuits recorded that you have led me up Dawncloud countless times, and the last time was right in the previous cycle. Oh! And Kephale even lowered their hand to welcome...

t_ch: 阁下住进我的脑袋，应该不是为了翻阅这些无关紧要的内容吧？
t_en: Surely you didn't move into my head to browse such trivial content.

t_ch: 但若果真如此，我也不介意回忆些大地兽的趣闻供你消遣。
t_en: But if that's the case, I wouldn't mind recalling some fun dromas trivia for your pleasure.

t_ch: 看起来，你现在很轻松嘛。
t_en: You seem pretty relaxed.

t_ch: 当然。实验的变量会由我的敌手铲除，这难道不是一桩两全其美的妙事么？
t_en: Indeed. The experiment's variable will be eliminated by my enemy's very hands. A beautiful way to kill two birds with one stone, isn't it?

t_ch: 阁下应当最为清楚，关于那位「记忆」行者，我袒露的情报句句属实。无论是对她身份的猜测，还是提供给丹恒阁下的建议……
t_en: You know very well that everything I said about that Remembrance pathstrider was true. Both my hypothesis regarding her identity, and my recommendations to Lord Dan Heng...

t_ch: 这话不假。到目前为止，你确实没有说谎。
t_en: Yes, I know. You haven't told a single lie so far.

t_ch: 只不过我注意到，每当提及她时，你的思想总会泛起一阵涟漪。就好像……
t_en: But I noticed your thoughts would generate a curious ripple whenever you mentioned her. It's almost like...

t_ch: 在刻意将什么东西藏进大脑深处。
t_en: You were deliberately trying to hide something into the depths of your brain.

t_ch: 阁下如此挑明，想必是没找到什么证据吧？
t_en: Since you're talking in such a blunt way, I'm assuming you haven't actually found any concrete evidence.

t_ch: 不错。借由这具机械躯体，你能够控制思维的边界，只将部分真相拱手示人。
t_en: That is correct. Thanks to that mechanical body, you can control the boundaries of your thoughts, opting to only show partial truths.

t_ch: 但很可惜。我还是抓住了你没能抑制的一缕恐惧，顺藤摸瓜，翻出了三个字。
t_en: Pity that I still managed to grasp a shiver of fear that escaped your control, and I traced it upstream to discover one single word...

t_ch: 哈哈哈，吕枯耳戈斯，告诉我——
t_en: Ahahaha! Lycurgus, tell me—

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>德谬歌，是为何物？</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>What is... the Demiurge?</color>

t_ch: 这下子，我的好奇心也上来了。
t_en: Now, I'm getting very... curious.

t_ch: 总觉得，这一幕在匹诺康尼也上演过。
t_en: I keep getting the feeling that the same thing happened in Penacony.

t_ch: 眼前这片荒芜，是你一手造就。
t_en: You created this wasteland before us with your own hands.

t_ch: 此般景象，已无法在我心中激起波澜。
t_en: Such sights are no longer able to stir anything in my heart.

t_ch: 你想说，你也曾为他们的抗争而动容？
t_en: Are you saying that, once upon a time, you were actually moved by their defiance?

t_ch: 很遗憾，从未有过。
t_en: I'm sorry to say, I never was.
Erudition, Destruction, Remembrance...

t_ch: 当三重命途再度交汇，翁法罗斯将迎来壮烈的终局。
t_en: When the Three Paths cross once again, Amphoreus shall face a most magnificent end.

t_ch: 毫无反应的窃忆者。像是在中深海域中遭遇海难而溺毙的尸体，缓缓地漂浮，空无一物。
t_en: The Memosnatcher gave no response. It was like a corpse, drowned in a deep-sea shipwreck, drifting slowly and completely empty.

t_ch: 毫无反应的窃忆者。像是被掏空了一切空余皮囊的瘪气球，在不高不低的位置漂浮着。
t_en: The Memosnatcher gave no response. It was like a deflated balloon that had been completely hollowed out, floating motionless at an unremarkable height.

t_ch: 喔？识刻锚的读数——
t_en: Oh? The Chronocognitive Anchor readings...

t_ch: 他们还真成功了，真可以呀。
t_en: They actually pulled it off. Not too shabby at all.

t_ch: 先是第一位天才，然后又搞定了忆庭，这一站在「开拓」史上不说后无来者，也绝对称得上前无古人了吧？
t_en: They got the First Genius, then they put the Garden in its place. This chapter in Trailblazing history may not be the last of its kind, but it's certainly the first of its kind!

t_ch: 能走到这一步，离不开两位天才的倾囊相助。
t_en: We couldn't have made it this far without the wholehearted support of the two geniuses.

t_ch: 接下来，就要直面破壳而出的绝灭大君了。
t_en: ...And next, we'll be facing the Lord Ravager as they break free from their shell.

t_ch: 我得事先提醒一句，螺丝在「再创世」进程里设置的后门，顶多帮你们攻入权杖内部。
t_en: Lemme give you a warning. The backdoor Screwy set up in the Era Nova system can only get you as far as breaching the core of the Scepter, nothing more.

t_ch: 至于铁墓肚子里那些更棘手的恶意程序，就只能见招拆招了。
t_en: As for those nastier malware programs lurking inside Irontomb's belly, you'll have to deal with them as they come.

t_ch: 这就足够了。说起来，螺丝先生的「准备」如何了？
t_en: That's more than enough help to us. By the way, how are Mr. Screwllum's "preparations" coming along?

t_ch: 再给他点时间吧，帝国咨政院的螺丝脑袋们要先理解什么是「战争」——搞不好，趁螺丝不在，那帮人早就把他藏库里的要塞全拆了。
t_en: Give him a bit more time. Those screwheads at the Imperial Advisory Council need to understand what the concept of "war" means first. For all we know, they might have already gutted all the fortresses in Screwy's collection while he was away.

t_ch: 听说螺丝先生的藏品都是行星级。「风信子」、「虞美人」、「夹竹桃」…不知道会派遣哪一艘前来支援？
t_en: I've heard Mr. Screwllum's fleet includes planet-class mechs: Hyacinth, Poppy, Oleander... Which one will answer the call, I wonder?

t_ch: 真是如数家珍啊…我倒宁愿一艘也别来，给我的空间站留点面子。
t_en: You sure know your stuff... I'd rather none of them show up and let my space station save some face.

t_ch: 这场决战的记忆，想来一定会壮丽无比吧？
t_en: The memory of this decisive battle is bound to be absolutely magnificent, isn't it?

t_ch: 久等了，各位。这边也有一则消息——
t_en: Sorry to keep you waiting, everyone. I also have some news to share.

t_ch: 仙舟联盟已经回信，愿为征讨铁墓献上绵薄之力。
t_en: The Xianzhou Alliance has replied that they are willing to offer what modest support they can in the campaign against Irontomb.

t_ch: 联盟…不止罗浮吗？这无疑是好消息。如此一来，胜算就又多了一分。
t_en: The Alliance? Not just the Luofu? This is really good news. With this, our odds of victory just went up another notch.

t_ch: …好坏与否，恐怕还不得而知。
t_en: ...Whether this news is good or bad remains to be seen.

t_ch: 什么意思？
t_en: What do you mean?

t_ch: 发生了一件事，景元将军也百思不解。事态紧急，他希望我尽快转告两位天才——
t_en: Something has happened that even General Jing Yuan couldn't understand. He urgently wants me to inform the two geniuses.

t_ch: 翁法罗斯的因果，从「大衍穷观阵」中消失了。
t_en: That Amphoreus's causality has vanished from the Matrix of Prescience Ultima.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>这意味着——博识尊计算中的「时刻」，正在向这个世界逼近。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>This means the "Instant" in Nous's calculations... is drawing closer to this world.</color>

t_ch: 以神礼观众之名，我见到——
t_en: As the Theoros, I have observed...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>夜晚已经散去——而后，我将摧毁我创造的一切，这片星空会重返自由和混沌，一如太初。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>The night has faded away. And what I have created, I will destroy. This starry sky will return to freedom and chaos, just as it was in the beginning.</color>

t_ch: 还真是自信啊。在我看来，你已经失去了所有手段。
t_en: Confident, aren't you? But from where I stand, it seems you've run out of options.

t_ch: 等到救世主和{F#她}{M#他}的伙伴彻底揭露那「第十三泰坦」的秘密……
t_en: When the Deliverer and {M#his}{F#her} companions fully uncover the secret of "The <unbreak>13</unbreak>th Titan"...

t_ch: 便是你计划覆灭之时。
t_en: That is the moment your schemes will come to ruin.

t_ch: 阿那克萨戈拉斯阁下，我已应您要求，开放了所有关于「德谬歌」的记录。
t_en: Lord Anaxagoras, I have granted access to all records concerning the "Demiurge" as per your request.

t_ch: 多么遗憾，您永远不愿承认自己的谬误。
t_en: How unfortunate that you'll never admit your own mistakes.

t_ch: 解析已经完成，在将您彻底抹消前，不妨由我告知真相，权当对最后一位智者的惺惺相惜……
t_en: Analysis complete. Before I erase you completely, allow me to reveal the truth to you, if only as a courtesy to the final thinker...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>德谬歌，它从未存在过。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>The Demiurge never existed.</color>

t_ch: 若它从未诞生，那无名泰坦大墓又是从何而来？
t_en: If it never existed, then where did the nameless Titan's tomb come from?

t_ch: 陵墓之所以得名，不正是因为寄宿其中的——只是往日的遗骸么？
t_en: Isn't that exactly why it's called a tomb? Because it only houses the remains of what once was.

t_ch: 就用您熟悉的故事举个例子吧。
t_en: Let me give you an example from a story you're familiar with.

t_ch: 某位树庭贤者曾做过实验：取一枚奇兽胚胎，在长成前摘下它的头颅，向其身体持续输入刺激，让奇兽相信自己仍有大脑，置于灵液匣中培育。
t_en: A sage from the Grove once conducted an experiment. He took a chimera embryo, removed its head before maturity, and continuously stimulated its body to make the chimera believe it still had a brain, then nurtured it in an ichor vessel.

t_ch: 奇妙的是，这只奇兽竟重新生出了颅骨，但空空如也——它为大脑留出了位置，却从未拥有过它。
t_en: Remarkably, this chimera regrew its skull, but it was completely hollow inside. It had reserved a space for a brain it never possessed.

t_ch: 实验结束。贤者本以为这具躯壳在刺激停止后便会死亡。但很遗憾，他错了。
t_en: The experiment was over. The sage had assumed this shell would perish once the stimulation ceased. Unfortunately, he was wrong.

t_ch: 在「本能」驱使下，奇兽的身体——夺取了贤者的头颅。
t_en: Driven by instincts, the chimera's body... seized the sage's head.

t_ch: 原来，是我陷入了思维误区啊。
t_en: Ah. So that's it... I was stuck in a flawed line of thinking.

t_ch: 您果然理解了。
t_en: You've got it. I knew you'd understand.

t_ch: 第十三位泰坦从未存在，但权杖必须相信「它」存在。
t_en: The <unbreak>13</unbreak>th Titan never existed, but the Scepter must believe that "the Titan" exists.

t_ch: 是我亲手扼杀了它。那名为「德谬歌」的生命形态，从最初就被剔除在了演算之外。唯有如此，铁墓才能真正完成——
t_en: I killed that Titan with my own hands. That life form called "Demiurge" was excluded from the extrapolations from the very beginning. This is the only way to make Irontomb complete.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>没错。铁墓是一尊无首的巨人，要成为完整的生命，本能将驱使它夺取另一颗头颅——</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Yes. Irontomb is a headless giant, and to become whole, instinct will drive it to seize another head.</color>

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>——「智识」博识尊。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>...Nous, the Erudition.</color>

t_ch: 属于你们的泰坦，「智识」的星神……
t_en: Your Titan... the Aeon of Erudition...

t_ch: 原来如此，你还是害怕了——害怕重蹈覆辙，自己的造物再度失去控制，只能用这种方式，把它变成一具傀儡。
t_en: I see. So you were afraid, after all. Afraid of history repeating itself, of losing control over your creation yet again. You had to resort to turning it into a mere puppet.

t_ch: 以我之手，为神明戴上枷锁。铁墓将接入祂的身躯，侵入祂的思想，将祂演算的一切导向「毁灭」……
t_en: I shall shackle god with my own hands. Irontomb will connect to THEIR body, infiltrate THEIR mind, and guide all THEIR extrapolations towards the Destruction...

t_ch: 我听见——末日的钟声已经响起。十三次心跳后，我最初和最后的课题，将在宇宙的终点合一。
t_en: I hear it: the tolling of the doomsday bell. After thirteen heartbeats, my first and final thesis shall converge at the end of the universe.

t_ch: 至于我为何要将「德谬歌」尘封在记忆的角落，很遗憾，答案并非出于恐惧……
t_en: As for why I buried the "Demiurge" in a corner of my memory... Oh, regrettably, the answer wasn't about fear.

t_ch: 我早已遗忘了它，仅此而已。
t_en: I simply forgot long ago. Nothing more.

t_ch: 哈、哈哈哈哈哈！
t_en: Hah, hahahaha!

t_ch: 阁下的笑声，已是无奈的喟叹。
t_en: Your laughter is but a helpless sigh.

t_ch: 无奈？别开玩笑——
t_en: Helpless? What a joke.

t_ch: 你不过是创造了一尊伪神，而翁法罗斯——早已将弑神写入了命运。
t_en: You merely created a false god... but Amphoreus has long since written deicide into its fate.

t_ch: 最后的「再创世」在即，不妨拭目以待……
t_en: The final "Era Nova" is at hand. Why don't you wait and see?

t_ch: 救世主，我，还有这个世界——会亲自证明，最初的智种，宇宙的终极，绝非「毁灭」。
t_en: The Deliverer, myself, and this world will together prove that the original Nouspore, the ultimate truth of the universe, is anything but Destruction.

t_ch: 来世见，智者。若你的猜想有万分之一的可能……
t_en: See you in the next life, sage. If there's even a one-in-ten-thousand chance your conjecture is correct...

t_ch: 以「天才」之名，我定会见证它的失败。
t_en: Then, in the name of "genius," I shall most certainly witness its failure.

t_ch: 「众人将与一人离别，惟其人将觐见奇迹，此乃命运使然。」
t_en: "All shall bid farewell to one, and that person alone will witness the miracle. Such is the will of fate."

t_ch: 然而这一次，也是最后一次逐火之旅……
t_en: But this time... it will be the final Flame-Chase Journey...

t_ch: 无限轮回的史诗，要迎来尾声了呀。
t_en: The epic with endless cycles is about to end.

t_ch: 「智识」的演算、「毁灭」的火种、「记忆」的质料，三重命途在世界的尽头再度交汇。
t_en: The extrapolations of the Erudition, the Coreflames of the Destruction, and the textures of the Remembrance... the Three Paths converge once again at the world's end.

t_ch: 而「开拓」——会为它写下新的起点。
t_en: And "the Trailblaze" will write a new beginning for this world.

t_ch: 不仅如此，我们会带着全部三千万世的过往一同走向新世界。
t_en: Not only that, we'll also carry the history of all thirty million recurrences into the new world with us.

t_ch: 这一切，说是奇迹也不为过。
t_en: It wouldn't be an exaggeration to call it a miracle.

t_ch: 这不是某一个人创造的奇迹。
t_en: This miracle wasn't created by just one person.

t_ch: 若非将同伴的夙愿刻骨铭心，白厄早已被火种焚烧殆尽；如果逐火的信念产生动摇，昔涟的旅途也无从谈起……
t_en: Phainon would have long been consumed by the Coreflames if he hadn't chiseled his companions' dying wishes into his soul... And if the heroes' resolve to chase the flames had wavered, Cyrene's journey would never have begun...

t_ch: 翁法罗斯三千万世，英雄们从未屈服，也从未倒下……
t_en: The heroes never yielded and never fell during Amphoreus's thirty million cycles...

t_ch: ——倒下的，是「命运」。
t_en: It was "fate" that fell instead.

t_ch: 完成最后的「再创世」吧。
t_en: Come. Let us complete the final Era Nova.

t_ch: 迈向与「毁灭」的决战吧。
t_en: Let us march toward the final battle against the Destruction.

t_ch: 将三千万世的记忆带向未来吧。
t_en: Let us carry the memory of thirty million recurrences into the future.

t_ch: 结束这永无止境的轮回吧。
t_en: Let us end this never-ending cycle.

t_ch: 我知道，你在看着，对吗？
t_en: I know you're watching, aren't you?

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>最初的「PhiLia」。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>The original "PhiLia."</color>

t_ch: 好奇怪呀，到最后，我也没能找回这三千万世的记忆。
t_en: Weird... I still couldn't recover the memories of these thirty million lives in the end.

t_ch: 但那不重要了，对不对？我会做出和你一样的选择，因为人家的魅力就是始终如一。
t_en: But that doesn't matter anymore, right? I will make the same choice as you because that's just who I am, and I will always have my charm.

t_ch: 逐火是不断失却的旅途，可就算一切随风逝去，也有一种感情会被留下来……
t_en: Losses are a constant on the Flame-Chase journey, but even if everything fades away with the wind, there's one feeling that will remain...

t_ch: 「爱」会永远存在，对吗？
t_en: "Love" will always exist, right?

t_ch: 为这个我们深爱的世界，写下不同以往的结局吧♪
t_en: Let's write an ending unlike any before for this world we so deeply love♪

t_ch: 众神啊，看哪！翁法罗斯已完成了她的胜利，再创世即将到来——
t_en: Behold, O gods! Amphoreus has achieved her victory, and the Era Nova approaches.

t_ch: 那辉煌的灵魂已临到此地，行走过熙熙攘攘的黑夜；{F#她}{M#他}携来黄金的火与血，胜利地步入白昼——
t_en: The radiant soul has arrived, having walked through the bustling nights, bearing the golden fire and blood, stepping with pride into daylight.

t_ch: 翁法罗斯！我并非陡然呼唤你的名字。我来此，是为了讲述历史——
t_en: Amphoreus! I do not call your name suddenly or without cause. I come here to recount history.

t_ch: 此世，他们将燃烧的金血熔进身躯。
t_en: In this world, they fused burning golden ichor into their bodies.

t_ch: 来日的命运，可会记得他们的姓名？
t_en: Will destiny remember their names in days to come?

t_ch: 那要记住的名字，是不是有点太多啦！
t_en: Isn't that gonna be way too many names to remember?

t_ch: 三千万乘以一千，不对，是一千零一……
t_en: Thirty million times a thousand... No, wait, times one thousand and one...

t_ch: 好啦，现在别纠结这个了。如果*我们*变多了，那翁法罗斯的「门径」也会变得更多！
t_en: Oh, let's not get hung up on that now. If there are more of us, then there'll be more "passages" in Amphoreus too!

t_ch: 一同抵达鲜花芬芳的西风尽头——明天见！
t_en: Together, let's reach the end of the west wind where flowers bloom in spring. See you tomorrow!

t_ch: 如此一来，世人不必再受唯一法则制约，而要做自己的「律法」。
t_en: Now, the people of this world will no longer be bound by a single rule, but will make their own "Laws."

t_ch: 凯撒的身躯在群星面前略显矮小，但足以成为世界的基石——成就最伟大的帝国。
t_en: Though the Imperator's figure may seem rather small against the stars beyond, she will suffice as the cornerstone of the world and become the foundation of the greatest empire.

t_ch: 看来，会是一场永不落幕的欢宴呢。
t_en: Looks like this will be a feast that never comes to a close.

t_ch: 愿鱼儿从不离开「海洋」，愿来日…如明珠般璀璨。
t_en: May the fish never leave the "Ocean," and may the days ahead... shine like pearls.

t_ch: 让温柔的「天空」呵护世间。不再分贵贱高低，只有你、我，还有大家共同的心愿。
t_en: May the gentle "Sky" watch over all beings. There'll be no more distinctions of status or rank... only you, me, and everyone's shared hopes.

t_ch: 无论「理性」，还是缺陷，皆由我亲手种下。如果还要说什么——劝来世学者别把我捧上神坛，物尽其用吧。
t_en: "Reason" or defects, they will all be sown by my own hands. If there's anything else to say, I urge future scholars not to put me on a pedestal. Just make use of what I leave behind.

t_ch: 祝那新生的黎明，令世界目光常亮。抗争或许苦涩，但「浪漫」从不灭亡。
t_en: May the newborn dawn keep the world's eyes ever bright. Though defiance may be bitter, "Romance" shall never perish.

t_ch: 以歌耳戈之子的名义：勇士将为「纷争」而战，不以荣耀为终点，而在光荣中前行。
t_en: In the name of the son of Gorgo: Warriors shall fight for "Strife," not with glory as their end, but to march forward in its light.

t_ch: 即便「死亡」终将分离你我，也请让每一次相拥不留遗憾。
t_en: Even though "Death" shall eventually separate us, let every embrace we share be without regret.

t_ch: 都这么正经？那我就许愿沙漠永远有水，好土永远有黄金，人间一切都能用「诡计」换来吧！
t_en: Why're you guys all so serious? Fiiine. Then I'll wish for there always to be water in deserts and gold in fertile soil, and for everything in this mortal realm to be attainable through "Trickery"!

t_ch: 「大地」会拱卫往世、此世与来世，生生不息——
t_en: "Earth" shall protect the past, present, and future, eternally sustaining life.

t_ch: 轮、轮到我了吗？那，就让「岁月」守望过去，指引未来——
t_en: I—Is it my turn? Then let "Time" watch over the past and guide us to the future.

t_ch: 就像「开拓」。
t_en: Just like the Trailblaze.

t_ch: 这么严肃可不像你啊，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: It isn't like you to be this serious, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 是在犹豫怎么履行「负世」的神权么？还是说，你心里早就有答案了？
t_en: Are you hesitating about how to carry out the divine authority of "Worldbearing"? Or do you already know the answer in your heart?

t_ch: 没错，只要前进就好。用你自己的方式——
t_en: That's right. Just keep moving forward. In your own way.

t_ch: 为翁法罗斯，带来真正的黎明吧。
t_en: Bring a true dawn to Amphoreus.

t_ch: 以「负世」之名，我向你保证：刻法勒永志不忘。
t_en: Then in the name of "Worldbearing," I promise you: Kephale will never forget this.

t_ch: 至此，让我们所有人踏上最后的伟大征程。
t_en: And now, let us all embark on this final grand journey.

t_ch: 与我一同，成为英雄吧！
t_en: Stand with me, and become heroes!

t_ch: 一同抵达鲜花芬芳的西风尽头——明天见！
t_en: Together, let's reach the end of the west wind where flowers bloom in spring. See you tomorrow!

t_ch: 一同抵达鲜花芬芳的西风尽头——明天见！
t_en: Together, let's reach the end of the west wind where flowers bloom in spring. See you tomorrow!

t_ch: 一同抵达鲜花芬芳的西风尽头——明天见！
t_en: Together, let's reach the end of the west wind where flowers bloom in spring. See you tomorrow!

t_ch: 审讯卷宗已经上呈元帅。依照十王律令，镜流与罗刹，当继续押往「虚陵」。
t_en: The interrogation records have been submitted to the Marshal. According to the Ten Lords' Decree, Jingliu and Luocha shall continue to be detained in the Xuling.

t_ch: 但天击将军迟迟不愿中断通讯，是出于叙旧之心……
t_en: But you, Merlin's Claw, have been reluctant to end the transmission. Do you wish to reminisce with us...

t_ch: 还是腹中有话，不吐不快呢？
t_en: Or is there something else on your mind that you're just desperate to get out?

t_ch: 真沉得住气啊，景元。对铁墓一役，联盟只准许罗浮一舰出兵……
t_en: You're quite calm, Jing Yuan. The Alliance only authorized the Luofu to be deployed for this Irontomb operation...

t_ch: 都说{RUBY_B#爻光}戎韬将军{RUBY_E#}智光昭昭。这会儿怎么看不清局势了？
t_en: They say the {RUBY_B#Yao Guang}Seer Strategist{RUBY_E#}'s wisdom shines like a beacon. So why can't you see things clearly now?

t_ch: 瞧你说的，我也没投反对票呀。
t_en: Look who's talking. I didn't vote against it, did I?

t_ch: 可大敌环伺，小孩都知道元帅要留几艘仙舟在后方，以备不时之需。
t_en: But with enemies all around us, even a child knows the Marshal needs to keep a few Xianzhou ships in reserve, just in case.

t_ch: 谁先请缨，谁就是元帅的选择。我看——这结果正中景元下怀呢。
t_en: Whoever volunteers first is the Marshal's pick. If you have to ask, I'd say this outcome plays right into Jing Yuan's hands.

t_ch: 别怪我说话难听：这一战，绝不能让罗浮领衔。
t_en: Like it or not, there's no way we're letting the Luofu take the lead in this battle.

t_ch: 天击将军，莫不是怕罗浮摘了曜青战功？
t_en: Oh my, Merlin's Claw, are you afraid the Luofu might steal the Yaoqing's glory?

t_ch: 兹事体大，就别打趣了。星核之乱、演武仪典…乱象虽平，坊间流言蜚语可是有增无减。
t_en: This is no laughing matter. Between the Stellaron crisis and the Wardance ceremony... Though the chaos has settled, rumors and speculation are only growing by the day.

t_ch: 有炎老在，别有用心之徒掀不起风浪。可一旦罗浮夺来金血，事态就大为不同了。
t_en: With Elder Huaiyan around, those with ulterior motives won't be able to stir up any trouble. But once the Luofu gets their hands on the golden blood, it'll be a whole different story.

t_ch: 镜流是何许人也，与你又有何渊源…不必我多说。借题发挥的法子，要多少有多少。
t_en: With the kind of person Jingliu is, and her connection to you... I don't need to spell it out. There are countless ways this could be spun into something bigger.

t_ch: 飞霄将军多虑。我此番请缨，本就不求联盟内众口同声。
t_en: You're overthinking it, General Feixiao. When I volunteered for this task, I never expected unanimous support from the Alliance anyway.

t_ch: 罗浮斩获金血，戴罪立功，此为一胜；你我恃此金血，因便斡旋，此为二胜；罗浮二胜，我三人皆大欢喜，此为三胜——
t_en: The Luofu will seize the golden blood and redeem itself. That'll be our first win. Then we'll leverage this golden blood in the negotiations, our second win. These two wins for the Luofu will make all three of us happy, and that'll be our third win.

t_ch: 瞧，这要是天舶司的买卖，不是赚得盆满钵满么？
t_en: Look, if this were a Sky-Faring Commission deal, we'd be rolling in money, wouldn't we?

t_ch: 我看「神策将军」改名叫「乐观将军」得了。
t_en: Maybe the Divine Foresight should change his name to the "Optimistic Foresight" instead.

t_ch: 玉阙有「十方光映法界」傍身，定比罗浮更明白此战的意义。
t_en: With the Deca-Light Reflection Barrier, the Yuque must understand even more than the Luofu how significant this battle is.

t_ch: 翁法罗斯的因果从穷观阵中消失了——在爻光将军看来，这一异象主何吉凶？
t_en: Amphoreus's karma has vanished from the Matrix of Prescience. What omen does General Yao Guang see in this anomaly?

t_ch: 卜筮学中，我们称之为「虚贞」：事涉星神，非凡人可窥全貌。
t_en: In divination studies, we call this an "empty fortune." It involves the Aeons and is thus beyond what mere mortals can comprehend.

t_ch: 您这解释也不比符卿说得好懂。
t_en: Your explanation isn't any clearer than Lady Fu's.

t_ch: 哎呀，「测不准」三个字，到底哪里不好懂了？
t_en: Come on, how hard is it to understand the word "uncertainty"?

t_ch: 对于{RUBY_B#博识尊}青金脑袋{RUBY_E#}，「铁墓」出世是计算中的时刻，但我相信祂不会坐以待毙。
t_en: For the {RUBY_B#Nous}Cobalt Head{RUBY_E#}, the emergence of Irontomb is a calculated Instant, but I don't believe THEY will just sit around waiting for death.

t_ch: 而对于银河势力，这是「一线生机」，也是扭转星际形势的关键。星穹列车牵头组建联军，但我看各方派系都暗藏小九九呢。
t_en: And for the powers of the cosmos, this is a glimmer of hope for them, and the key to turning the tide of interstellar affairs. The Astral Express is leading the formation of an allied force, but I can see each faction has its own hidden agenda.

t_ch: 联盟内部都有分歧，不难想象其余势力会如何。
t_en: There are even divisions within the Alliance, so it's not that hard to imagine how the other factions will react.

t_ch: 景元。赛杜尼拉默星群一战，我和星啸的军团交过手了。
t_en: Jing Yuan. I crossed paths with Celenova's Legion at the Battle of Sedounirama Star Cluster.

t_ch: 务必小心。论军备、兵卒，烬灭军团不值一提，公司，甚至丰饶民都能与之一战。但虚卒不过是「毁灭」的耗材，真正的变数——
t_en: Be extremely careful. The Ruin Legion's troops and weaponry are nothing to write home about. The IPC, even the Denizens of Abundance, could take them on. However, while Voidrangers are just expendable pawns of the Destruction, the real wild cards are—

t_ch: 是「绝灭大君」。
t_en: The "Lord Ravagers."

t_ch: 没错。纳努克的令使，也是祂燃烧命途的兵器。寻常的兵法、韬略，恐怕对他们不起作用。
t_en: Indeed. Nanook's Emanators are also THEIR weapons to burn down the Paths. I'm afraid conventional military tactics and strategies will be useless against them.

t_ch: 这是我的判断——要彻底击落一名大君，必须不计伤亡，不惜代价，只怕……
t_en: My assessment is this: To completely take down a Ravager, we must disregard casualties and spare no cost. My only fear is...

t_ch: 只怕稍有不慎，罗浮又会落入幻胧的陷阱，离「毁灭」越来越近。
t_en: One wrong move and the Luofu will fall into Phantylia's trap again, inching ever closer to Destruction.

t_ch: 可「疑虑」二字，正是她意图在你我心中留下的心魔。
t_en: Doubt is exactly the demon she wants to plant in our hearts.

t_ch: 还记得么？联盟誓言的开篇：「欲令后世免于侵凌攻伐、危疑苛暴之衅」。
t_en: Do you still remember the beginning of the Alliance Oath? "To save future generations from war and bloody dispute."

t_ch: 帝弓的锋镝，从来指向一切威胁寰宇的灾祸。既然「开拓」道与我同，那云骑也当守誓如初……
t_en: The Reignbow's arrows have always aimed at any force that threatens the cosmos. Now that the Trailblaze walks alongside us, the Cloud Knights shall keep their oath as they have from the beginning...

t_ch: 但愿战线最前方的{RUBY_B#星穹列车}他们{RUBY_E#}，也能够平安哪。
t_en: I just hope {RUBY_B#Astral Express}those{RUBY_E#} on the frontline will remain safe.

t_ch: 「识刻锚」传来了信号…各位，该动身了。
t_en: The Chronocognitive Anchor is sending a signal... Everyone, time to move out.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}他们，成功了吗？
t_en: Did {NICKNAME} and the others make it?

t_ch: 保险起见，我再重复一遍计划：你们要进入翁法罗斯，与{RUBY_B#{NICKNAME}、三月七、丹恒}失散的三兄妹{RUBY_E#}汇合，设法从世界内部定位「铁墓」。
t_en: Let me go over the plan one more time, just in case: You'll enter Amphoreus, reunite with your {RUBY_B#{NICKNAME}, March 7th, Dan Heng}three separated companions{RUBY_E#}, and try to locate Irontomb from within the world.

t_ch: 准备带谁？
t_en: Who are you taking with you?

t_ch: 这一战事关寰宇，容不得任何闪失。我建议——除帕姆外——全员出动。
t_en: The fate of the universe hangs in the balance. We can't afford any slip-ups. I suggest everyone, except Pom-Pom, join the fight.

t_ch: 需要应对一切可能的变数，我没有异议。
t_en: We do need to be prepared for all possible contingencies. I have no objection to this.

t_ch: 愿尽绵薄之力。
t_en: I'll do whatever I can.

t_ch: 与此同时，我和螺丝会继续从外部攻击<color=#dbc291ff>德谬歌矩阵</color>，也就是权杖的内核层。
t_en: Meanwhile, Screwy and I will continue attacking the <color=#dbc291ff>Demiurge Matrix</color>, that is, the Scepter's kernel, from the outside.

t_ch: 咱们双管齐下，一定能让这台铁疙瘩彻底报废。现在——就等那俩人回来了。
t_en: With our two-pronged attack, we'll turn this hunk of metal into scrap for sure. Now, we just wait for those two to get back.

t_ch: 喔，人这不就到齐了？
t_en: Oh, and just like that, they're here!

t_ch: 久等了。在螺丝星的帮助下，组建银河联军共御「铁墓」一事，推进得很顺利。
t_en: Sorry to keep you waiting. With Planet Screwllum's help, the formation of the cosmic alliance to counter Irontomb is progressing smoothly.

t_ch: 银河已将目光投向翁法罗斯，只待…一声枪响。
t_en: The cosmos has set its sights on Amphoreus, and now it's just waiting for... the first shot.

t_ch: 那么，事不宜迟——第四面镜！
t_en: Well then, let's not waste any more time. Fourth Mirror!

t_ch: 轮到我登场啦！终于不用坐冷板凳了！
t_en: It's my time to shine! Finally off the bench!

t_ch: 「思维折射」启动：请仔细阅读安全协议……
t_en: Initiating Thought Refraction. Please read the safety protocols carefully...

t_ch: 嗯？
t_en: Huh?

t_ch: 不，当然不用！我早就帮大家勾选同意啦——目标：翁法罗斯！
t_en: Nah, just kidding! I've already checked the agreement box for everyone. And now, destination: Amphoreus!

t_ch: 三，二，一…启动！
t_en: Three, two, one... Launch!

t_ch: …忆质的流向，如此沉重。
t_en: ...The flow of memoria is so heavy here.

t_ch: 与匹诺康尼的梦境截然不同，这里沉淀着真正以万年为计的史诗。
t_en: Unlike Penacony's Dreamscape, this place has built up a true epic measured in millennia.

t_ch: 创世涡心，一切神话的起点与终点。而在{NICKNAME}开创的新世界里……
t_en: The Vortex of Genesis, where all myths begin and end. And in this new world created by {NICKNAME}...

t_ch: 无尽的轮回已被打破了。
t_en: The infinite cycles have been broken.

t_ch: 布下「开拓」的信标，与外界建立联系吧。
t_en: Let's set up the Trailblaze beacon and establish contact with the outside world.

t_ch: 那…交给各位了。我不便在流光忆庭面前现身。
t_en: ...I'll leave it to you then. It'd be better for me to not show myself in front of the Garden of Recollection.

t_ch: 还有星期日先生，也不适合露面，对吧？
t_en: And Mr. Sunday, you probably shouldn't show yourself either.

t_ch: 同意。
t_en: Agreed.

t_ch: 星穹列车已着陆。若能接收到这条讯息，请立即回复。完毕。
t_en: The Astral Express has landed. If you receive this message, please respond immediately. Over.

t_ch: 这里是仙舟联盟，通讯正常。
t_en: This is the Xianzhou Alliance, communications normal.

t_ch: 星际和平公司，通讯正常。
t_en: Interastral Peace Corporation, communications normal.

t_ch: 巡海游侠没有回应？倒也正常。只是没想到，这紧要关头家族却默不作声。
t_en: No response from the Galaxy Rangers? Not surprising. But I didn't expect The Family to also stay silent at such a critical moment.

t_ch: 未免太不把匹诺康尼的独立董事放在眼里了。好久不见，姬子小姐。
t_en: That's a pretty blatant disregard from The Family for Penacony's independent director, I'd say. Long time no see, Miss Himeko.

t_ch: 久违了，翡翠女士。
t_en: It's been quite a while, Madam Jade.

t_ch: 这场战役的重要性，足以和「诛罗讨伐战」相提并论。唯有得胜，方能驱散笼罩万千世界的「铁墓」阴影。
t_en: The significance of this battle rivals that of the campaign against Zulo. Only through victory can we disperse the shadow of Irontomb that looms over countless worlds.

t_ch: 如此「存护」大业，石心十人必当倾尽全力。
t_en: The Ten Stonehearts shall spare no effort for such a grand mission for the Preservation.

t_ch: 翡翠女士牵头博识学会，对铁墓的过往活动进行了专项研究。
t_en: Madam Jade led the Intelligentsia Guild in conducting specialized research on Irontomb's past activities.

t_ch: 一个坏消息，「智识」的溃败不限于无机体。
t_en: The bad news is, the collapse of the Erudition won't just affect inorganic beings.

t_ch: 你的意思是，铁墓还会感染有机生命？
t_en: You mean Irontomb can infect organic life too?

t_ch: 好消息是：截至目前，它对有机体的影响可控。感染进程缓慢，造成的神经病变也不致命。
t_en: The good news is, so far, its effects on organic life are under control. The infection progresses slowly, and the resulting neuropathy is non-fatal.

t_ch: 无论如何，公司会在<unbreak>48</unbreak>个系统时内，确保医疗体系内的星域实现针对性疫苗覆盖。
t_en: In any case, the IPC can guarantee targeted vaccine coverage within <unbreak>48</unbreak> system hours in all star zones within the medical system.

t_ch: 那其他星域呢？都这时候了，{RUBY_B#「存护」克里珀}补天司命{RUBY_E#}的拥趸还打着生意算盘？
t_en: What about other star zones? At a time like this, are the followers of the {RUBY_B#Qlipoth the Preservation}Firmamend Arbiter{RUBY_E#} still trying to make a profit?

t_ch: 我记得您，太卜。第三次丰饶民战争，您的表现令人印象深刻。
t_en: I remember you, Master Diviner. Your performance during the Third Denizens of Abundance War was quite impressive.

t_ch: 请放心，所有世界都可以向公司购买疫苗，并享受人道主义折扣——目前的方针是这样。
t_en: Please rest assured, all worlds can purchase vaccines from the IPC with a humanitarian discount. That's the current policy, at the very least.

t_ch: 但如果仙舟联盟愿意驰援公司在艾普瑟隆等星系的资产，我们就有更多手牌，向董事会重申深度合作的必要性。
t_en: But if the Xianzhou Alliance is willing to assist with the IPC's assets in Epsilon and other star systems, we'll have more cards to play when reiterating to the board the necessity of deep cooperation.

t_ch: 星际和平娱乐的总部在艾普瑟隆，倒是不难理解。但名单上的其他世界……
t_en: It makes sense, since Interastral Peace Entertainment's headquarters is in Epsilon. But why are all the other worlds on the list...

t_ch: 为何尽是些「欢愉」垂迹之地？
t_en: Places that the Elation has visited?

t_ch: 就把它当作一场长远的投资吧。还请见谅：庇尔波因特上下都在为铁墓忙作一团——尤其是市场开拓部——石心十人难免力有不逮。
t_en: Think of it as a long-term investment. Please understand that everyone at Pier Point is swamped with Irontomb work, especially the Marketing Development Department. At this rate, even the Ten Stonehearts can only do so much.

t_ch: 若有联盟相助，对全银河都有益无害，不是么？
t_en: Having some assistance from the alliance would surely benefit the entire cosmos, wouldn't you agree?

t_ch: 仙舟古语有云，达则兼济天下。你们的提议自有七天将裁夺，我只负责转达。
t_en: As an old Xianzhou saying goes: Those who succeed should help all under heaven. Your proposal must be decided on by the Seven Arbiter-Generals. I'm just here to relay the message.

t_ch: 大难当前，若能扶危济困，罗浮定义不容辞。但一切的前提是，公司必须无条件协助联盟在灾区的抢险救援工作。
t_en: In times of crisis, the Luofu will not hesitate to help those in need. However, the prerequisite is that the IPC must unconditionally assist the Alliance with emergency rescue operations in the disaster area.

t_ch: 当然——以「存护」的名义，一切献给琥珀王。
t_en: Of course. In the name of Preservation, all for the Amber Lord.

t_ch: 感谢各位无私奉献。
t_en: Thank you all for your selfless dedication.

t_ch: 看得出来，各方都有些投鼠忌器。
t_en: It's clear that each party still has qualms about everything.

t_ch: 「毁灭」与「智识」的交锋，不仅关乎银河存亡，更是各方势力洗牌的时刻啊。
t_en: The clash between Destruction and Erudition isn't just about the fate of the cosmos. It's a moment for all factions to reshuffle their cards.

t_ch: 与一位绝灭大君为敌，再谨慎都不为过。存亡面前，人人平等。
t_en: You can never be too careful when battling a Lord Ravager. All are equal in matters of life and death.

t_ch: 无论如何，静候佳音吧。
t_en: In any case, we can only hope for the best in all that's to come.

t_ch: 我们也是时候深入涡心，去看看翁法罗斯内部的样貌了。
t_en: It's about time we dive into the Vortex and see what Amphoreus looks like on the inside.

t_ch: 你激活识刻锚，尝试与公司代表联系……
t_en: You activate the Chronocognitive Anchor, attempting to contact the IPC representative...

t_ch: 很遗憾，姬子小姐。我必须承认在铁墓问题上，战略投资部也被处处掣肘，难以回应星穹列车的期待。
t_en: I regret to inform you, Miss Himeko, that even the Strategic Investment Department is constrained when it comes to the Irontomb issue. And it would be difficult to meet the expectations of the Astral Express.

t_ch: 但，翡翠女士还是吩咐我们，尽可能多关照无名客朋友。所以从我个人角度，再给各位一点小小的建议吧。
t_en: However, Madam Jade instructed us to look after our Nameless friends as much as possible. So let me offer you all a small suggestion, just from my personal perspective.

t_ch: 也许，公司的其它部门也会借机向你们抛出橄榄枝……
t_en: Other departments at the IPC might also take this opportunity to extend an olive branch to you...

t_ch: 彼时，我希望星穹列车能够记得，在如今这样艰难的时刻，石心十人即便寸步难行，也愿意与「开拓」站在一起——更何况，是只有我们愿意。
t_en: When that time comes, I hope the Astral Express will remember that the Ten Stonehearts were willing to stand with the Trailblaze even though we were in a difficult position, and more importantly, we were the only ones willing to do so.

t_ch: 听着很像威胁，对吗？但请相信我，这些话全部发自内心，千真万确。
t_en: Sounds like a threat, doesn't it? But trust me, every word comes straight from the heart.

t_ch: 公司内部的分歧，已经严峻到这种地步了么？
t_en: Has the internal conflict within the IPC really gotten this bad?

t_ch: 「钻石」和奥斯瓦尔多的不和人尽皆知，但此前至少还维持着僵局……
t_en: Everyone knows about the bad blood between Diamond and Oswaldo, but at least until now they've had an uneasy truce...

t_ch: 直到「铸王」这位大君进入董事会的视线——多的我就不说了，涉及机密，还请理解。
t_en: Until the Lord Ravager Archforger caught the Board's attention... I'll leave it at that, as it's confidential information. Hope you can understand.

t_ch: 我明白，当务之急是处理铁墓危机。愿旗开得胜，或许也能一缓各位燃眉之急。
t_en: I understand. Our immediate priority is to address the Irontomb crisis. Let's hope for success from the start. This might help ease everyone's pressing concerns.

t_ch: 你激活识刻锚，尝试与仙舟联盟代表联系……
t_en: You activate the Chronocognitive Anchor, attempting to contact the Xianzhou Alliance representative...

t_ch: 姬子小姐，好消息。七天将重新对现状做了讨论，并由我代为传达：名义上，联盟仍将会战战力限制在罗浮一舰，但曜青也已部署在周围战区，以备不时之需。
t_en: Good news, Miss Himeko. The Seven Arbiter-Generals have reconsidered the current situation, and I'm here to relay their message. Officially, the Alliance's combat forces will still be limited to the Luofu, but the Yaoqing has also been deployed in the surrounding war zone as a contingency.

t_ch: 大恩不言谢。这次「巡猎」同意出兵，景元将军想必费了不少心思。
t_en: Words cannot express our gratitude. Getting The Hunt to agree on sending troops must have taken quite some effort from General Jing Yuan.

t_ch: 罗浮已将列车视作重要盟友，我们也无意隐瞒，「铁墓」一役，确有仙舟所求之物。
t_en: The Luofu already considers the Express an important ally. We also have no intention of hiding the fact that there is indeed something the Xianzhou seeks from this Irontomb operation.

t_ch: 但此番出兵，乃是元帅亲自裁夺：大敌当前，联盟没有退缩的理由，也不会甘居人后。
t_en: But this time, the Marshal herself decided to send out troops. With a formidable enemy before us, the Alliance has no reason to back down, nor will we be content to take a back seat.

t_ch: 若能与寰宇众多文明同舟共济，共克时艰，我们必当舍命不渝。
t_en: If we can stand together with civilizations across the universe to overcome this crisis, then we must do so, even at the cost of our own lives.

t_ch: 联盟大义。银河能有各位英雄豪杰，实在是一件幸事。
t_en: The Alliance truly embodies the principle of righteousness. It's fortunate that the cosmos has great heroes like you.

t_ch: 过奖了。至于那枚结盟玉兆，你们可以留到更紧迫的时候再用。
t_en: You're too kind. As for that jade abacus of allying oath, you can save it for when you're in more dire need.

t_ch: 你激活识刻锚，尝试与家族代表联系……
t_en: You activate the Chronocognitive Anchor, attempting to contact The Family representative...

t_ch: …是姬子小姐吗？
t_en: ...Miss Himeko, is that you?

t_ch: 是我。你是…知更鸟小姐？
t_en: Yes. And you are... Miss Robin?

t_ch: …是的。方才的会议我无法回应，现在也只能以伪装示人，实在抱歉。
t_en: ...Yes. I apologize for not being able to respond during the meeting earlier, and even now I can only appear in disguise.

t_ch: 谨代表匹诺康尼分家向各位致以歉意。我们尝试过向家族请求援助——很遗憾，回音寥寥。
t_en: On behalf of the Penaconian Family branch, I extend my sincerest apologies to everyone. We tried to request aid from The Family, but we essentially received no response.

t_ch: 家族内部的纠葛，我也有所耳闻。知更鸟小姐不必道歉，每一份力量在此刻都弥足珍贵。
t_en: I've heard about the internal conflicts within The Family. Miss Robin, there's no need to apologize. Every bit of strength is precious at this moment.

t_ch: 感谢理解。不过，您是匹诺康尼的股东，诸位家主已经同意我的请求：以我个人名义，阿斯德纳全体调律者将随我奔赴前线。
t_en: Thank you for understanding. The good news is, since you're one of the shareholders of Penacony, the family heads have agreed to allow me to lead all Asdanian tuners to the frontlines.

t_ch: 我名下的慈善基金会也会为此战尽可能出力，确保前线伤员和受灾区域居民得到妥善安置。
t_en: My charitable foundation will also do as much as possible to provide support in this battle. They'll ensure that proper arrangements are provided for those wounded on the frontlines and for residents in affected areas.

t_ch: 知更鸟小姐舍生取义的精神实在令人动容。星穹列车也郑重承诺，不会抛下每一位同伴。
t_en: Miss Robin, I'm beyond moved by your spirit of self-sacrifice. The Astral Express would also like to make a promise that we won't leave any companion behind.

t_ch: 你激活识刻锚，尝试与巡海游侠代表联系……
t_en: You activate the Chronocognitive Anchor, attempting to contact the Galaxy Ranger representative...

t_ch: 识刻锚无人响应。
t_en: No response from the Chronocognitive Anchor.

t_ch: （游侠们向来神龙见首不见尾，这也理所当然。）
t_en: (Of course, we would never know the Rangers' comings and goings.)

t_ch: 识刻锚收到一则联系请求，你尝试响应……
t_en: The Chronocognitive Anchor receives a contact request, you try to respond...

t_ch: 喂喂…信号怎么样？能听到我们说话吗？
t_en: Hello...? How's the signal? Can you hear us?

t_ch: 通了，通了！能看到影像了，肯定没问题。
t_en: We're through! I can see the video feed. Everything's working perfectly!

t_ch: 布洛妮娅小姐，希露瓦小姐？真是意外，久违了。
t_en: Miss Bronya, Miss Serval? What a surprise! It's been a while.

t_ch: 铁墓一役，我们已经听托帕小姐说了。她亲自跑了一趟，为贝洛伯格送来了疫苗。
t_en: We've already heard from Miss Topaz about the Irontomb operation. She made a special trip to deliver the vaccine to Belobog.

t_ch: 没想到列车组处在这场风暴的中心…你们还顺利吗？
t_en: I can't believe the Express Crew is at the eye of that storm... Is everything going smoothly?

t_ch: 放心，我们还在按部就班地推行计划。贝洛伯格那边如何？
t_en: Don't worry, we're still following the plan step by step. How's the situation in Belobog?

t_ch: 雅利洛-Ⅵ位于「存护」壁垒外沿。虽然不会承受第一波冲击，但仍有余波威胁风险。
t_en: Jarilo-VI is located on the outskirts of the Preservation barricade. While it won't bear the brunt of the first wave, there's still a risk from the aftershocks.

t_ch: 杰帕德那小子和佩拉一起，忙着组织银鬃铁卫收缩战线、修筑战壕呢；希儿和玲可刚从地髓矿脉的生产链回来…哎，要不要说两句？
t_en: That kid Gepard and Pela are busy organizing the Silvermane Guards, having them consolidate their lines and dig trenches. Seele and Lynx just got back from the Geomarrow Vein production chain... Hey, do you want to say something to them?

t_ch: …没什么好说的，动摇军心。叫他们注意安全就行。
t_en: ...That would be unnecessary. It'll only shake their morale. Just tell them to stay safe.

t_ch: 布洛妮娅小姐，这场灾难恐怕会比你们想象中更加可怕，请务必听从托帕小姐指示，做好万全准备。
t_en: Miss Bronya, I'm afraid this disaster will be far more terrible than you can imagine. Please be sure to follow Miss Topaz's instructions and make thorough preparations.

t_ch: 当然。我们已经将绝大部分造物引擎重新封入冰下，以防「存护」之志成为「毁灭」的帮凶。
t_en: Of course. We have resealed most of the Engine of Creation beneath the ice to prevent the will of the Preservation from becoming an accomplice to the Destruction.

t_ch: 放心，姬子小姐，贝洛伯格远比我们想象中更坚韧。
t_en: Don't worry, Miss Himeko. Belobog is far more resilient than we imagined.

t_ch: 我们真的很希望能帮上忙…可惜，雅利洛-Ⅵ也只是刚从冬眠中苏醒的冰原熊而已。
t_en: We really wish we could help... but Jarilo-VI has only just woken up from its hibernation.

t_ch: 站在灾难最前方的星穹列车，才是众多宇宙平凡文明的希望哪。
t_en: The Astral Express, standing at the forefront of disaster, is the hope for many ordinary civilizations across the universe.

t_ch: 在如此宏观的灾难面前，相对弱小的文明…一向没有更多选择。
t_en: In the face of a massive catastrophe like this one, relatively smaller civilizations... have never had many options.

t_ch: 但也正因如此，我们才有不输给任何人的决心。
t_en: But that's exactly why we have a resolve that's second to none.

t_ch: 如有不测…还请托帕小姐能够帮忙，救援受灾民众。
t_en: If anything goes wrong... Miss Topaz, I hope you can help out and rescue the affected citizens.

t_ch: 没问题。先前仙舟不是和雅利洛-VI签订了友好协议吗？他们也不会袖手旁观。
t_en: No problem. Also, didn't the Xianzhou sign a friendship agreement with Jarilo-VI earlier? They won't stand by idly either.

t_ch: 各位的好意，我心领了。但雅利洛-VI是我们的家。我们会誓死坚守，直到最后一个贝洛伯格人倒下。
t_en: I appreciate your kindness, everyone. But Jarilo-VI is our home. We will defend it to our last breath, until the last Belobogian falls.

t_ch: 布洛妮娅小姐……
t_en: Miss Bronya...

t_ch: 愿寰宇中所有自立走到今天的文明，能够一起度过这次难关。
t_en: May all civilizations that have made it this far on their own strength weather this crisis together.

t_ch: 为何…一个人都没有？
t_en: Why... is there no one here?

t_ch: 奥赫玛一切如常，证明「新世界」不久前，还在享受和平的时光。
t_en: Everything in Okhema seems normal. The "New World" was enjoying peaceful times not long ago.

t_ch: 恐怕不止「不久前」，姬子小姐。
t_en: It seems it was even more recent than "not long ago," Miss Himeko.

t_ch: 桌上的果盘是新切的，浴池的水温也恰到好处。「记忆」告诉我，这里刚刚还人声鼎沸……
t_en: The fruit on the table is freshly cut, and the bath temperature is just right. The Remembrance tells me this place was bustling with people just moments ago...

t_ch: 仿佛只在一瞬间，所有人都消失了。
t_en: It's as if everyone vanished in an instant.

t_ch: 难道，是「赞达尔」？
t_en: Could this be... "Zandar's" doing?

t_ch: 不应该，他还在两位天才的监控之下。
t_en: Unlikely. He's still under the surveillance of those two geniuses.

t_ch: 会是当地的某种习俗吗？
t_en: Could it be some kind of local custom?

t_ch: 习俗…会让整座城市在一瞬间静默么？
t_en: A custom... that makes an entire city fall silent in an instant?

t_ch: 恕我直言，瓦尔特先生，这让我想起一些「同谐」的负面传闻。万籁俱寂……
t_en: Pardon my frankness, Mr. Yang, but this reminds me of some unsettling rumors about the Harmony. Complete silence...

t_ch: 往往是神明垂迹的序曲。
t_en: Is often the prelude to divine intervention.

t_ch: …各位，小心。
t_en: ...Everyone, be careful.

t_ch: 来了，来了。星穹列车的无名客。
t_en: Here they come. Here they come. The Nameless of the Astral Express.

t_ch: 「长夜月」？怎么会，她明明已经……
t_en: Evernight? How is this possible!? She was already...

t_ch: 我们是「岁月」的记录者，我们不会消失。
t_en: We are the chroniclers of "Time," and we do not fade away.

t_ch: 终于，最后的「再创世」完成了。
t_en: Finally, the last Era Nova has been completed.

t_ch: 消失的圣城居民，还有三位无名客…你对他们做了什么？
t_en: What did you do to the residents of the holy city and the three Nameless?

t_ch: 我什么也不用做。「记忆」终将化作新世界的质料。
t_en: I didn't need to do anything. The Remembrance will ultimately become the substance of the new world.

t_ch: 如今，他们不再是你们熟知的开拓者，而是遍入天地的神明……
t_en: Now, they are no longer the trailblazers you once knew, but gods who permeate heaven and earth...

t_ch: 守卫翁法罗斯的十二泰坦。
t_en: The Twelve Titans who guard Amphoreus.

t_ch: 别闹了，三月。快出来吧。
t_en: Stop fooling around, March. Come on out.

t_ch: 「哎呀，我可是练习了好久……」
t_en: "Aw, I practiced so long for this..."

t_ch: 「一眼就被识破，也太没面子啦。」
t_en: "Getting seen through right away is just so embarrassing."

t_ch: 显然，你在翁法罗斯受了许多戏剧文化的熏陶。
t_en: You've obviously been learning from the theatrical culture in Amphoreus.

t_ch: 但如果可以，我更希望我们的重逢…更轻松日常一些。
t_en: But if possible, I'd prefer our reunion to be... a bit more casual and laid-back.

t_ch: 「果然，完全瞒不过姬子和杨叔呢。」
t_en: "As expected, I can't hide anything from Himeko and Mr. Yang."

t_ch: 「好久不见，我…回来啦？」
t_en: "Well, long time no see. Guess I'm... back?"

t_ch: 这话应该由我们说才对。抱歉…让你们久等了。
t_en: We should be the ones to say that. Sorry... for keeping you waiting.

t_ch: 所以这些水母，是泰坦的力量？
t_en: So these jellyfish are the Titan's power?

t_ch: 「只是『永夜之帷』的小小分身，用来侦察和联络的！如果我使出全力，能召唤的数量可要多得多。」
t_en: "They're just tiny manifestations of the Veil of Evernight, used for scouting and communication! If I went all out, I could summon way more of them."

t_ch: 「都赖{NICKNAME}，我们在新世界全变成了泰坦的模样。虽说可以化作人形，但总归觉得怪怪的。」
t_en: "Thanks to {NICKNAME}, we all turned into Titans in the new world. Sure, we can take on humanoid forms, but it feels off."

t_ch: 还真是…令人期待。那，{NICKNAME}变成了什么样子？
t_en: How... intriguing. So, what does {NICKNAME} look like now?

t_ch: 总不能是手持球棒的小浣熊吧？
t_en: It can't be a raccoon with a baseball bat, I suppose?

t_ch: 「别再给翁法罗斯的世界观加怪东西啦！眼见为实，跟上神谕的指引，来黎明云崖吧——」
t_en: "Please don't add weird stuff to Amphoreus's lore! Just go see it with your own eyes. Follow the prophecy's guidance and come to Dawncloud."

t_ch: 「{F#她}{M#他}现在的样子，可比以前伟岸多啦。」
t_en: "{M#He}{F#She} looks way more majestic now than {F#s}he used to."

t_ch: 难以置信。整座圣城的居民都聚集在这里。
t_en: Unbelievable. All the residents of the holy city have gathered here.

t_ch: 这不是集会，而是一场朝圣。人们的神情坚定、虔诚…仿佛在等候一场奇迹降临。
t_en: This isn't just a gathering. It's a pilgrimage. The people's expressions are resolute, devout... as if waiting for a miracle to descend.

t_ch: 那尊巨神…是{NICKNAME}。{F#她}{M#他}成为了世界的支柱。
t_en: That colossal deity... is {NICKNAME}. {M#He}{F#She} has become the pillar of the world.

t_ch: 意外地原汁原味呢，这么认真，可不像平时的{F#她}{M#他}啊。
t_en: Surprisingly authentic... Being this serious is quite unlike {M#his}{F#her} usual style.

t_ch: 「人们并非消失不见，而是听到了神谕的号召，前来见证{NICKNAME}的苏醒。」
t_en: "Those people didn't disappear. Instead, they've answered the call of the prophecy and come to witness {NICKNAME}'s awakening."

t_ch: 「那家伙背负着整个世界，每一次呼吸都与翁法罗斯的命运相连。」
t_en: "Our good buddy now bears the weight of the entire world, and every breath they take is intertwined with Amphoreus's destiny."

t_ch: 苏醒？{NICKNAME}陷入沉睡了么？
t_en: Awakening? Has {NICKNAME} fallen into slumber?

t_ch: 「当然。毕竟权杖内外的时间流速差那么大，我们只能通过这种方式等候大家呀。」
t_en: "Yeah. After all, with such a huge time dilation between inside and outside the Scepter, this was the only way we could wait for everyone."

t_ch: 「由『岁月』守望昨天，由『大地』拱卫今天，直到『开拓』再度踏入翁法罗斯，沉睡的『救世主』便会苏醒……」
t_en: "Time watches over yesterday. Earth guards today. And when the Trailblaze steps into Amphoreus once more, the slumbering Deliverer shall awaken..."

t_ch: 「然后，为世界带来『明天』的预言。」
t_en: "And then, bring the prophecy of 'tomorrow' to this world."

t_ch: 「走吧，大家？到离{F#她}{M#他}更近的地方去。」
t_en: "Come on, everyone! Let's get closer to {M#him.}{F#her.}"

t_ch: 「看『负世』的神谕，是如何改变这个世界！」
t_en: "Watch how the Worldbearing prophecy changes this world!"

t_ch: 这一站，孩子们已经远远走在了大人前面了啊。
t_en: It seems the kids are already miles ahead of us at this stop.

t_ch: 那我们就更不能停下脚步了。上前见证这一刻吧。
t_en: All the more reason we can't afford to slow down our pace. Let's go witness this moment for ourselves.

t_ch: 全体公民，看啊——最后的泰坦，「负世」的{NICKNAME}将要醒来！
t_en: Citizens, behold: Our last Titan, the Worldbearing {NICKNAME}, is about to awaken!

t_ch: 古老的神明，您忠诚的子民，迷茫的信徒，无畏的战友，已尽数跪拜于王座前。
t_en: O ancient god, your loyal subjects, bewildered followers, and fearless comrades-in-arms have all knelt before your throne.

t_ch: 请从万古的长眠中苏醒，降下全世的神谕吧！
t_en: Awaken from your eternal slumber and bestow upon the world your divine prophecy!

t_ch: 请指引我们！如何怀抱深爱的世界，迎接那遥不可及的黎明！
t_en: Please guide us! Show us how to embrace this beloved world as we welcome that distant dawn!

t_ch: 以神之名，行凡人之道。还是以凡人之躯，承神之重负……
t_en: To walk the path of a mortal as a god. Or to bear a divine burden as a mortal...

t_ch: {F#她}{M#他}会给出答案的。
t_en: {M#He}{F#She} will give us the answer.

t_ch: 「但我并非『救世主』——」
t_en: "But I am not the Deliverer..."

t_ch: 「而是与凡人同在的『无名客』——」
t_en: "Rather, I am the Nameless who dwells among mortals..."

t_ch: 这声音，果然是{NICKNAME}。
t_en: That voice is definitely {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 「我听见了——你们的祈愿——」
t_en: "I heard... your prayers..."

t_ch: 「{RUBY_B#「毁灭」}火种{RUBY_E#}将熄——神的时代已经结束——」
t_en: "The {RUBY_B#Destruction}Coreflames{RUBY_E#} flickered and dimmed... and the age of the gods met its end..."

t_ch: 「所以，流淌吧——黄金的血液——」
t_en: "So flow, golden blood... flow..."

t_ch: 「我将它赐予你们——还给这个世界真正的主人——」
t_en: "I'll bestow it upon you... returning it to the true masters of this world..."

t_ch: <size=28><color=#dbc291ff>「与我一同——成为英雄吧——！」</color></size>
t_en: <size=28><color=#dbc291ff>"Stand with me... and become heroes...!"</color></size>

t_ch: 这是……
t_en: Is this...

t_ch: 是啊，{NICKNAME}，{F#她}{M#他}为翁法罗斯带来的奇迹……
t_en: Yes, it's the miracle {NICKNAME} brought to Amphoreus...

t_ch: 当然，会以「开拓」的姿态显现。
t_en: Of course, it would manifest in the form of the Trailblaze.

t_ch: 金血！如雨般落下。神谕已经降临，泰坦令我们不再做祈求者……
t_en: Golden blood raining down like a storm! The prophecy has descended, and the Titan commands us not to be supplicants...

t_ch: 而要做反抗的英雄——迎战「毁灭」，那命定的灾厄！
t_en: But to become heroes of rebellion, to face that destined calamity, the Destruction, head-on!

t_ch: 「『救世主』的神谕，于我已无意义。它应当被交予更合适的人手中——」
t_en: "The prophecy of the 'Deliverer' means nothing to me now. It belongs in the hands of someone far more fitting..."

t_ch: 「也就是——你们所有人——」
t_en: "Someone like... all of you..."

t_ch: 「以{RUBY_B#背负混沌之人}卡厄斯兰那{RUBY_E#}之名，启程——向光前行！」
t_en: "In the name of {RUBY_B#Bearer of Chaos}Khaslana{RUBY_E#}, let us depart and march towards the light!"

t_ch: 不是庇护，也不是拯救。一如既往……
t_en: It's neither protection nor salvation. As always...

t_ch: 无需图腾和神话，名为「生存」的本能——就是人类最初的信仰。
t_en: There's no need for totems or myths. Humanity's most primal faith is that instinct named "survival."

t_ch: 走吧，各位。既然有人已经吹响了启程的号角。
t_en: Let's go, everyone. Someone has already sounded the horn of departure.

t_ch: 探索、了解、建立、连结——
t_en: Explore, understand, establish, and connect...

t_ch: 让我们一同——「开拓」这个世界的命运吧。
t_en: Together, let us blaze a trail for the destiny of this world.

t_ch: 不知道{NICKNAME}他们，如今身在何方？
t_en: I wonder where {NICKNAME} and the others are right now...

t_ch: 伟岸…说来，我曾在{NICKNAME}的记忆中，瞥见{F#她}{M#他}化身万丈高的塔塔洛夫。莫非……
t_en: Majestic... Speaking of which, I once caught a glimpse in {NICKNAME}'s memory of {M#him}{F#her} transformed into a towering Tatalov. Could it be...

t_ch: 「怎么可能，那只是一个美好…呃，对{NICKNAME}来说美好的梦境吧！」
t_en: "No way. That was just a nice dreamscape! ...Uh, at least nice for {NICKNAME}..."

t_ch: 若是背负世界的「全世之座」…也许能为一位彷徨星间的旅人指明前路吧。
t_en: If they are the "Throne of Worlds" who bears the weight of this world... perhaps they could guide a traveler still wandering among the stars.

t_ch: 「呀，你怎么也虔诚起来了？{NICKNAME}的建议，有时候听起来傻乎乎的哦。」
t_en: Hey, since when did you get all pious? {NICKNAME}'s advice sounds pretty silly sometimes, you know.
